title: senecio riomayensis
intro: Senecio riomayensis, also known as the Riomay groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating liver and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio riomayensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Senecio riomayensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in folk medicine as a treatment for various health conditions.
